vocab.meaning: sự tò mò không bao giờ thỏa mãn
vocab.example: Driven by an insatiable curiosity, I spent most of my weekends conducting 'science experiments' in the kitchen.

vocab.meaning: hoạt động theo đuổi đơn độc (làm một mình)
vocab.example: Reading was my favorite solitary pursuit; I could get lost in a book for hours without needing any company.

vocab.meaning: sự nỗ lực thể chất/vận động mạnh
vocab.example: I wasn't particularly fond of sports that required intense physical exertion, preferring more sedentary hobbies like drawing.

vocab.meaning: trí tưởng tượng sống động/phong phú
vocab.example: My friends and I relied on our vivid imagination to transform the local park into a medieval fortress.
I used to love to tinker with old electronic toys to see if I could figure out how the internal circuits worked.
Board games often brought out my competitive streak, making family game nights quite intense.
My parents always encouraged any artistic endeavor, whether it was finger painting or building clay models.

vocab.meaning: sự gắn kết cộng đồng/tập thể
vocab.example: Playing neighborhood football matches was less about the score and more about communal bonding with the local kids.
I now realize that the complex strategy games I played actually played a vital role in my cognitive development.

vocab.meaning: sự thoát ly thực tại thuần túy
vocab.example: Building elaborate sandcastles at the beach was a form of pure escapism for me every summer.
